title: Stability — newly emerged patterns in the last hour
prompt: Are there any patterns that have just started firing in the last hour — patterns that were silent an hour ago but are active now? List up to 3, name them specifically, and characterize whether they look like incidents or normal new traffic.
persona: Oncall SRE responding to a vague 'something weird is happening' report.

expected_answer.summary: In the last 1 hour, 5 patterns newly emerged. Top meaningful: service_name_product_reviews_trace_sampled_True_HTTP_Request_POST_llm_chat.
